raw_consumer_statement: I filed a complaint with Sears shop your way credit card to remove the payment that should never have been charged because my car became inoperable in mid to late XXXX. I sent XXXX an email not to bill me. When I calXXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX they can't find my information, don't know if its under the previous car owner because they ask for my XXXX XXXX for billing my credit card. I sent an email cancelation to XXXX XXXX on XX/XX/year>. I got the email where I ask them not to bill my Sears Credit card on XX/XX/year>. Yet they billed my card XX/XX/year>. Now I'm confused because of the back and forth, Sears credit recharge it back to my account saying I owe XXXX XXXX based off the got my credit card informationwhich they ask for to do a 90 day free trial. A service I can't use due to car being inoperable/ at which the 90 days were close to endinging soon and still not repaired. I just want all fees associated with my account to be removed, any late fee over the limit fees, aggravated stress of being on the phone for 3 hours with XXXX and hours of Sears.
